title: ageratina sternbergiana
intro: Ageratina sternbergiana, also known as Mexican Mountain Mint, is a plant species native to Mexico and Guatemala, belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Ageratina sternbergiana include relief from digestive issues, colds, and flu, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate headaches. Ageratina sternbergiana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
